description: XSUAA security descriptor for the Northwind CAP service

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.northwind.view
scopes.description: Grants read access to all NorthwindService entity sets

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.northwind.admin
scopes.description: Grants full read access including $metadata and diagnostics endpoint

role-templates.name: NorthwindViewer
role-templates.description: Read all exposed entities — default user role

role-templates.name: NorthwindAdmin
role-templates.description: Read + access to $metadata and diagnostics endpoint
